description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a black, skeletonized stock and a long, ventilated handguard. The receiver and barrel assembly are robust, with a drum magazine mounted beneath the action, suggesting high-capacity ammunition storage. The handguard is adorned with multiple cutouts, likely for weight reduction and heat dissipation, and the overall finish is matte black with subtle metallic highlights. The pistol grip is ergonomic, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver. The rifle is equipped with iron sights mounted along the top rail, and the muzzle appears to have a standard, unadorned finish. The construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, optimized for durability and urban tactical use.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, drum magazine, and ventilated handguard, finished in matte black with iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular muzzle and the symmetrical arrangement of the handguard cutouts.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the rifle, the skeletonized stock, drum magazine, and the detailed handguard.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the open structure of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the magazine, stock, and the overall tactical profile.
